channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-04 05:46 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: These ads for@spencerprattfor Mayor of Los Angeles are game changers. Inspiring!
item.description: These ads for@spencerprattfor Mayor of Los Angeles are game changers. Inspiring!

item.title: @elonmusk: Falcon 9 launches the CAS500-2 mission from California and delivers 45 payloads to orbit
item.description: Falcon 9 launches the CAS500-2 mission from California and delivers 45 payloads to orbit

item.title: @elonmusk: infinitybuilds.ggThe best Diablo 4 website. One community. We aim to support every language the game...
item.description: infinitybuilds.ggThe best Diablo 4 website. One community. We aim to support every language the game supports. Translations powered by Grok — built to understand the universe. No better AI for this. 🇺🇸🇨🇳🇧🇷🇪🇸🇫🇷🇩🇪🇯🇵🇰🇷

item.title: @elonmusk: We will announce an order-of-magnitude monetization multiplier for livestreams soon.
item.description: We will announce an order-of-magnitude monetization multiplier for livestreams soon.

item.title: @elonmusk: To clarify, the current terminals can support peak download speeds of 400-500 Mbps. The 220 Mbps num...
item.description: To clarify, the current terminals can support peak download speeds of 400-500 Mbps. The 220 Mbps number is referring to actual in-flight performance given that the satellite to user beams are shared amongst users. For larger commercial planes, we allocate more resources to ensure sufficient bandwidth. Other providers quote peak speeds as real performance, which is only relevant if you have very few users.@starlinkquotes real performance measured via automated network performance tests. The latest aviation terminal supports two channels, so up to 1 Gbps peak speeds per terminal (the A380 design consists of 3 of these terminals). We will continue to increase peak bandwidth per terminal in future revisions.

item.title: @elonmusk: Every American should demand fair, secure elections. Without them, we don’t have a country. For year...
item.description: Every American should demand fair, secure elections. Without them, we don’t have a country. For years, the left has been playing a dangerous game, trying to redefine voting, reshape representation, and blur the meaning of American citizenship. And when it comes to voter ID? They push the same tired narrative, claiming it’s somehow “unfair” to people of color. That requiring an ID is an obstacle, because we supposedly can’t get one. That’s not compassion. That’s soft BIGOTRY. Black Army veteran, Member of Congress, Six forms of ID. I’m still waiting for the explanation. Instead… silence.

item.title: @elonmusk: Men have become one point more conservative - women have become 23 points more liberal.
item.description: Men have become one point more conservative - women have become 23 points more liberal.

item.title: @elonmusk: It’s hard to understand what the other 39% are thinking. Once you drive a Tesla, it’s like driving a...
item.description: It’s hard to understand what the other 39% are thinking. Once you drive a Tesla, it’s like driving an all-seeing sensor with a super computer behind the scenes doing all the decision making, driving and navigation. Also, you never have to go to a gas station.

item.title: @elonmusk: Many people (incorrectly) think Native American tribes lived in peace and harmony. The noble savage ...
item.description: Many people (incorrectly) think Native American tribes lived in peace and harmony. The noble savage myth is merely a myth.

item.title: @elonmusk: Path to Petawatts is Mass drivers on Moon
item.description: Path to Petawatts is Mass drivers on Moon
